mapper.select: SELECT model_name AS modelName, COUNT(*) AS totalDetections, AVG(dice_score) AS avgDice, AVG(iou_score) AS avgIoU, AVG(precision) AS avgPrecision, AVG(recall) AS avgRecall, AVG(f1_score) AS avgF1, AVG(accuracy) AS avgAccuracy, AVG(inference_time) AS avgInferenceTime FROM detection_record WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY model_name ORDER BY avgDice DESC
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM detection_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT u.username, COUNT(d.id) AS totalDetections, AVG(d.dice_score) AS avgDice FROM detection_record d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.user_id, u.username ORDER BY totalDetections DESC
